use_cases: Showcasing SaaS product features in an interactive step-by-step carousel format
Creating engaging product tours that let users navigate through feature highlights
Displaying dark and light theme product screenshots with smooth animated transitions
Guiding users through onboarding flows with visual step indicators
Presenting e-commerce platform capabilities in an engaging showcase layout
ai_summary: A multi-step feature carousel component that displays product features with associated imagery across 4 steps. Features smooth animated transitions between steps, dark/light mode image variants, and interactive navigation. Uses motion/react for fluid animations and mouse-tracking parallax effects for an engaging showcase experience commonly used on SaaS landing pages.
